description.value: **Benefit:** As long as you are conscious and not stunned, dazed, or confused, allies within 30 feet who can see and hear you gain your bravery bonus on saving throws against fear. If you have Improved Bravery, they gain your bravery bonus on saving throws against all mind-affecting effects. If you have Social Bravery, your bravery bonus is added to the DC of checks to demoralize them, feint against them, change their attitude, or convince them to perform a request.
